campaign: Harry Potter & Titanic Ticket Sales Campaign

introduction.headline: Turn Spectators into Ticket Buyers
introduction.subheading: A Complete Content + Conversion Strategy for Your Immersive Exhibitions
introduction.overview: This campaign reimagines exhibition marketing around one core truth: people don't hesitate on logistics — they hesitate on emotional commitment. By creating cinematic content that conveys the emotional weight and urgency of these once-in-a-lifetime experiences, we drive immediate ticket purchases.
introduction.methodology: Every piece of content is tied to a conversion metric. We don't measure success in likes — we measure it in tickets sold.

phase_1_30_day_pilot.focus: One exhibition (Harry Potter OR Titanic) — prove the model works

video_scripts.format: Shot-by-shot breakdown with production notes, text overlays, voiceover direction, music cues
video_scripts.production_notes: Ready for videographer or editing with stock footage

social_media_posts.format: Copy + visual recommendations, hashtag research, posting schedule

carousel_ads.includes: Headline variants (6 per carousel for A/B testing), CTA buttons

production_brief.format: HTML document showing all assets, specs, and production requirements

strategy_deliverables.creative_brief: Emotional direction, visual palette, messaging pillars for chosen exhibition
strategy_deliverables.platform_strategy: Which content goes where and why (TikTok vs Facebook vs YouTube)
strategy_deliverables.audience_targeting: Demographics, interests, behaviors of high-intent ticket buyers
strategy_deliverables.ad_copy_testing: 6 variations per ad for multivariate testing
strategy_deliverables.posting_calendar: 30-day content schedule with optimal posting times

management_and_reporting.campaign_setup: Ad account configuration, audience creation, pixel setup
management_and_reporting.weekly_optimization: Pause underperformers, increase spend on winners
management_and_reporting.weekly_reports: Performance metrics vs targets, recommendations for next week
management_and_reporting.iterations: 2 content refreshes based on performance data

expansion_from_pilot: Add second exhibition (now running Harry Potter + Titanic simultaneously)
Increase content production (more variations, faster iteration)
Expand audience reach (lookalike audiences, broader targeting)
Add paid search (Google Ads targeting exhibition keywords)

monthly_content_production.video_ads: 6 per exhibition (18 total) — new scripts every 2 weeks
monthly_content_production.social_posts: 40 per exhibition (80 total) — diverse formats and angles
monthly_content_production.carousel_ads: 8 per exhibition (16 total) — continuous A/B testing

platform_expansion.youtube: Video storytelling + brand building (10% of budget)

optimization_cycle.process: Review data → identify winners → increase spend → test new angles

reporting.includes: CTR, CPC, conversion rate, tickets sold, revenue, ROAS, trend analysis
reporting.strategy_calls: Monthly 30-min call reviewing results and planning next month

video_production_addition.shoot_day: 1 full day of professional video production at exhibition
video_production_addition.deliverable: 50-100 custom video clips for ad integration
video_production_addition.includes: Cinematographer, color grading, music, professional editing
video_production_addition.usage: Custom footage integrated into ads, increasing authenticity + performance

low_initial_conversion.risk: First 2 weeks may show low ROAS while algorithm learns
low_initial_conversion.mitigation: We expect this. Focus on getting 100+ conversions for algorithm to optimize.

creative_fatigue.risk: Same ad shown too many times = declining performance

audience_too_small.mitigation: Expand to new platforms (Google, YouTube) + lookalike audiences

external_factors.risk: Exhibition closed, event postponed, external news
external_factors.mitigation: Flexible pausing/resuming of campaigns, quick messaging pivots

timeline_to_launch.day_1: Strategy kickoff call, exhibition asset collection, audience research
timeline_to_launch.days_2_5: Content production (scripts, graphics, ad copy variants)
timeline_to_launch.days_6_8: Ad account setup, audience creation, pixel configuration, final review

next_steps.step_1: Confirm exhibition selection (Harry Potter, Titanic, or both)
next_steps.step_2: Provide exhibition assets (photos, video, brand guidelines, pricing structure)
next_steps.step_3: Set up ad accounts access + analytics tracking
next_steps.step_4: Confirm monthly budget ($5K recommended minimum for meaningful scale)
